title: PGIMER Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Medical Research Associate Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has released an official notification for 2026. Allotted various vacancies for Medical Research Associate Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the MD/ MS can use this chance and apply for the PGIMER Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
